subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath spoken that which transcendeth the comprehension of the servant, Who hath hearkened unto the call of the sincere ones, and Who hath answered with that which [3.5s]... ...We have commanded all to observe wisdom, but from the friends we see heedlessness and negligence.  They should guard the Tablets as they guard their eyes
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نطق بما عجز عن عرفانه الخادم و سمع ندآء المخلصین و اجاب بما
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @transcendence; unknowability of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @wisdom [hikmat]
